is an Indian [Malayalam](/wiki/Malayalam "Malayalam")-language [free-to-air](/wiki/Free-to-air "Free-to-air") general Entertainment television channel owned by [Mata Amritanandamayi Math](/wiki/Mata_Amritanandamayi_Math "Mata Amritanandamayi Math"). It was launched on 14 April 2005.

**Amrita TV** is an Indian [Malayalam](/wiki/Malayalam "Malayalam")-language [free-to-air](/wiki/Free-to-air "Free-to-air") general Entertainment television channel owned by [Mata Amritanandamayi Math](/wiki/Mata_Amritanandamayi_Math "Mata Amritanandamayi Math"). It was launched on 14 April 2005.

## Former shows

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Amrita_TV&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Former shows")]

### Serials

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Amrita_TV&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Serials")]

* [Thonnyaksharangal](/w/index.php?title=Thonnyaksharangal&action=edit&redlink=1 "Thonnyaksharangal (page does not exist)") (2025)
* [Aanpirannol](/wiki/Aanpirannol "Aanpirannol")
* [Aliyan VS Aliyan](/wiki/Aliyan_VS_Aliyan "Aliyan VS Aliyan")
* [Jagratha](/wiki/Jagratha "Jagratha") (2016 - 2017)
* [Aparichitha](/w/index.php?title=Aparichitha&action=edit&redlink=1 "Aparichitha (page does not exist)") (2015 - 2016)
* [Kali Gandaki](/wiki/Kali_Gandaki "Kali Gandaki") (2012 - 2013)
* [Satyam Shivam Sundaram](/wiki/Satyam_Shivam_Sundaram "Satyam Shivam Sundaram") (2011 - 2013)
* [Ayyappa Saranam](/w/index.php?title=Ayyappa_Saranam&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ayyappa Saranam (page does not exist)") (2017)
* [Aathiraponnu](/w/index.php?title=Aathiraponnu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Aathiraponnu (page does not exist)") (2008 - 2009)
* [Souhrdam](/w/index.php?title=Souhrdam&action=edit&redlink=1 "Souhrdam (page does not exist)") (2011)
* [Akatheeshwaram](/w/index.php?title=Akatheeshwaram&action=edit&redlink=1 "Akatheeshwaram (page does not exist)") (2007)
* [Aruvikkaathal](/w/index.php?title=Aruvikkaathal&action=edit&redlink=1 "Aruvikkaathal (page does not exist)") (2007)
* [Punitravattunnorumbal](/w/index.php?title=Punitravattunnorumbal&action=edit&redlink=1 "Punitravattunnorumbal (page does not exist)") (2006)
* [Akathil Oru Pookal](/w/index.php?title=Akathil_Oru_Pookal&action=edit&redlink=1 "Akathil Oru Pookal (page does not exist)") (2009)
* [Ponnu Poloru Pennu](/w/index.php?title=Ponnu_Poloru_Pennu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ponnu Poloru Pennu (page does not exist)") (2009)
* [Sree Padmanabhan](/w/index.php?title=Sree_Padmanabhan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Sree Padmanabhan (page does not exist)") (2008)
* [Sindooracheppu](/wiki/Sindooracheppu "Sindooracheppu") (2009 - 2010)
* [Ottacchitthanal](/w/index.php?title=Ottacchitthanal&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ottacchitthanal (page does not exist)") (2007)
* [Samasya](/wiki/Samasya "Samasya") (2006)
* [Manikkyappoovu](/w/index.php?title=Manikkyappoovu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Manikkyappoovu (page does not exist)") (2007)
* [Kathuthattu](/w/index.php?title=Kathuthattu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Kathuthattu (page does not exist)") (2006)
